zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington於大約1472年出生在英國多瑟特萊 雷吉時，她的父親Lord Thomas Baker28歲，母親Lady Joan Barrett24歲。她於大約1508年與John Williams在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年11月19日在英國多瑟特費德利福德享年94歲，埋葬在英國戴文肯恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington于大约1472年出生在英国多瑟特萊 雷吉时，她的父亲Lord Thomas Baker28岁，母亲Lady Joan Barrett24岁。她于大约1508年与John Williams在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年11月19日在英国多瑟特費德利福德享年94岁，埋葬在英国戴文肯恩。

nameMeanings.name: Baker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from Middle English bakere, Old English bæcere, a derivative of bacan ‘to bake’. It may have been used for someone whose special task in the kitchen of a great house or castle was the baking of bread, but since most humbler households did their own baking in the Middle Ages, it may also have referred to the owner of a communal oven used by the whole village. The right to be in charge of this and exact money or loaves in return for its use was in many parts of the country a hereditary feudal privilege. Compare Miller . Less often the surname may have been acquired by someone noted for baking particularly fine bread or by a baker of pottery or bricks.

Americanized form (translation into English) of surnames meaning ‘baker’, for example Dutch Bakker , German Becker and Beck , French Boulanger and Bélanger (see Belanger ), Czech Pekař, Slovak Pekár, and Croatian Pekar .

History: Baker was established as an early immigrant surname in Puritan New England. Among others, two men called Remember Baker (father and son) lived at Woodbury, CT, in the early 17th century, and an Alexander Baker arrived in Boston, MA, in 1635.

variants.name: Miller
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Baxter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English baxter ‘baker’ (from Old English bæcestre ‘baker’, earlier ‘female baker’, the feminine equivalent of bæcere). Compare Baker .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington was born about 1472, in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, her father, Lord Thomas Baker, was 28 and her mother, Lady Joan Barrett, was 24. She married John Williams about 1508, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 19 November 1565, in Fiddleford, Dorset, England, at the age of 94, and was buried in Kenn, Devon, England.

Elle a épousé John Williams environ 1508, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1565, à Fiddleford, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre.

Lei sposato John Williams circa 1508, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 도르세트 림 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Thomas Baker(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Barrett(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1508년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Williams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 11월 19일 영국 도르세트 피들레퍼드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 켄에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Williams aproximadamente 1508, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Baker Lady baroness Of Herrington родилась около 1472 г. в местности лим регис, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Thomas Baker было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Barrett, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Williams около 1508 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 19 ноября 1565 г. в местности фиддлефорд, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности кенн, девон, Англия.

Se casó con John Williams aproximadamente 1508, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1565, en Fiddleford, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra.
